zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne Hoo於1495年出生在英國波克夏阿炳頓時，她的父親Thomas Hoo60歲，母親Maude Bardolf63歲。她於1519年與Sir Thomas Reade在英國英格蘭波克夏阿炳頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1575年10月30日在英國英格蘭波克夏阿炳頓享年80歲，埋葬在英國波克夏阿炳頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne Hoo于1495年出生在英国波克夏阿炳頓时，她的父亲Thomas Hoo60岁，母亲Maude Bardolf63岁。她于1519年与Sir Thomas Reade在英国英格兰波克夏阿炳頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1575年10月30日在英国英格兰波克夏阿炳頓享年80岁，埋葬在英国波克夏阿炳頓。

nameMeanings.name: Hoo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chi, Wai Lam, Wing, Beng, Chin, Gan, Hing, Hui, Kee, Lai, Lai Ching, Mei-Mei.
variant Romanization of the surname   Hu  .

variants.name: Hu
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Ming, Ping, Bin, Yi, Ying, Jing, Xiao, Qi, Yan, Chi.  Korean Chang, Chung, Min, Yiping, Chong, Chul, Hu, Jung Soo, Sang Hoon, Tian, Wook, Yiming.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 胡, a term referring to the ethnic minorities in ancient northern and western China: (i) from Hu (胡), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Henan province) during the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771 BC ). After it was annexed by the state of Zheng (located in present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) in the 26th year of the reign of King Ping of Zhou (died 720 BC ), people from the fief adopted 胡, the name of the state, as their surname. (ii) from Hu (胡), the name of a state (located in present-day Anhui province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu in the 15th year of the reign of Duke Ding of Lu (ruler of the state of Lu, reigned 509–495 BC ), people from the fief adopted 胡, the name of the state, as their surname. (iii) from the personal name of Hu Gong Man (胡公满, Duke Hu of Chen), the posthumous title of Yu Man. He was given the fief of Chen (located mainly in present-day Henan and Anhui province) by King Wu of Zhou (c. 1087–1043 BC ). (iv) from the personal name of Hu Guang (胡廣), who changed his original surname 黃 to 胡 during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ). (v) from the Hu Gu (胡骨) or He Gu (纥骨) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their surname to 胡 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534 AD ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 扈, meaning ‘retinue’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Hu (扈), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Shaanxi province) dating back to the Xia dynasty (2070–1600  BC ) (ii) adopted as a surname by the Hu Di Gan (扈地干) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne Hoo was born in 1495, in Abingdon, Berkshire, England, her father, Thomas Hoo, was 60 and her mother, Maude Bardolf, was 63. She married Sir Thomas Reade in 1519, in Abingdon, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 30 October 1575, in Abingdon, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in Abingdon, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne Hoo est née en 1495, à Abingdon, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Hoo, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Maude Bardolf, avait 63 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Reade en 1519, à Abingdon, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 octobre 1575, à Abingdon, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Abingdon, Berkshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Hooが1495年にイギリスバークシュアイアアビングドンで生まれた時，父Thomas Hooは60歳，母Maude Bardolfは63歳であった。1519年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアアビングドンでSir Thomas Readeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1575年10月30日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアアビングドンで80歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアアビングドンにて埋葬された。

ko.Charlton-All-Saints, Wiltshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 찰턴 앨 세인츠
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Hoo(이)가 1495년 영국 버크실르 압잉던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Hoo(은)는 60세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maude Bardolf(은)는 63세였다. 그녀는 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 압잉던에서 Sir Thomas Reade(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1575년 10월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 압잉던에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 압잉던에 묻혔다.

ru.Charlton-All-Saints, Wiltshire, England: чарлтон алл сеинц, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne Hoo родилась в 1495 г. в местности абингдон, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Hoo было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude Bardolf, 63. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Reade в 1519 г. в местности абингдон, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 30 октября 1575 г. в местности абингдон, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности абингдон, биркшир, Англия.

es.Linkenholt Manor, Hampshire, England: Linkenholt Manor, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Charlton-All-Saints, Wiltshire, England: Charlton All Saints, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anne Hoo nació en 1495, en Abingdon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Hoo, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Maude Bardolf, tenía 63 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Reade en 1519, en Abingdon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 30 de octubre de 1575, en Abingdon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Abingdon, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
